title: athlete — realtime broadcast channels
description: Three broadcast channel families for live UI updates. Tenant-level channel for cross-branch HR dashboards; branch-level channel for the branch-manager's daily roster view; user-level channel for a User's own athletes (parent-facing 'my kids' surface + adult-athlete self-view). Reverb driver is the default transport. Medical events are DELIBERATELY NOT broadcast on any channel — they route through the notifications module's HR channel only.

channels.name: tenant.{tenantId}.athletes
channels.description: Tenant-wide athlete lifecycle stream. Sink for HR + safeguarding dashboards showing cross-branch activity.
channels.notes: Payload is trimmed to non-confidential fields (see data-classes.json). Medical changes NEVER broadcast on this channel. First name + last name of MINORS stripped from the payload (regulated_minor tier); only age_group_id + branch_id remain.

channels.name: branch.{branchId}.athletes
channels.description: Branch-scoped athlete activity. Powers the branch manager's live roster view.
channels.authorization: sanctum::authed AND (permission `athletes.viewAny` scoped to branch_id OR branch_manager for this branch OR platform_admin)
channels.notes: Minor names stripped as with the tenant channel.

channels.name: user.{userId}.athletes
channels.description: Per-user athlete stream — powers the 'my kids' widget for guardians + the self-view widget for adult athletes. Emits events for athletes the caller is responsible for (via AthleteGuardian rows) OR the athlete they ARE (via user_id).
events: AthleteCreated (where athlete.user_id = userId OR EXISTS(AthleteGuardian where user_id=userId AND athlete_id=athlete.id))
AthleteMinorTurnedAdult (where athlete.user_id = userId OR guardian.user_id = userId)
channels.notes: AthleteMedicalUpdated is dispatched through a separate HR-channel mechanism — never on the realtime channel (private-tier). Photo consent flips (AthletePhotoConsentChanged) DO broadcast because guardians want live confirmation their preference took effect.
